dialogue.greeting: *huff puff* Oh thank goodness you're here!
dialogue.problem: The air in our village has gone completely stale. We need fresh air molecules — the kind that make up 78% of our atmosphere!
dialogue.hint: Nitrogen atoms love to form triple bonds. If you put two of them together in the lab, you'll get a very stable gas.
dialogue.success: Ahhh! I can breathe again! You're a true chemist! Here's your reward.
